description: Append-only event log for proposal decisions. Each entry records an approval or rejection.

events.notes: Created session-behavior.json with two rules: git_context_always_restate and disagreement_limit_per_decision. Voice surface promoted from stub to active.
Created brewmind-companion-contract-ref.json as governance pointer to docs/companion-agent/brewmind-companion-contract.md with 8-section index. Workflows surface promoted from stub to active.

Created policy.json with seven sections: capture_policy, durability_classes (transient/persistent), retention_thresholds, deduplication_rules, hygiene_schedule, tag_taxonomy, source_weighting. memory-policy surface promoted from stub to active.
